reviews.text: I cannot recommend Ben and El enough. Absolutely stunning photos and the video of our day brought us to tears. We had a very nontraditional wedding day with a last minute change of plans due to weather and Ben was so easy to work with.

Ben was absolutely brilliant from start to finish. Professional, efficient, friendly and, most importantly, took the most fabulous photographs of our wedding. We are so happy to have the memories that he captured. We could not have wished for a better photographer. Thank you Ben!

Ben is an outstanding photographer! When researching a photographer for our Telluride wedding at Gorrono Ranch, it really wasn't a contest. Ben had everything we wanted from the charming candids to the non-cheesy group shots all the way to the glowing sunset photos. Our parents and a few of the guests noted on his professionalism and how he was so sly in that you never even realized he was there. We couldn't be happier with our choice to hire Ben and recommend him to anyone getting married in or outside of Telluride.

Ben Eng is a photography ninja. He was super experienced and professional and knew the area extremely well. He directed us to some areas that he knew would be good and the photos turned out looking unreal. We would recommend Ben for anyone getting married in Telluride. I love looking through the pictures and reliving that incredible day.

Ben was incredible (not to mention the coolest guy you'll meet in Telluride). He was so calm and go with the flow, but equally professional and followed our timelines to a "T". He was willing to do whatever/go wherever to get the perfect shot, and was very organized and thoughtful regarding logistics. I always felt that he was accessible. As weird as this may sound, his presence alone will make you feel calm, cool and collected on your big day! Additionally, he stayed all night - even a bit past our contract, which meant so much that he captured every last detail of our day. The actual photos? INCREDIBLE... and exceptionally high quality, especially given that our day was unfortunately overcast, windy, and freezing. If he can take photos like these with those conditions, you can rest assured they will be flawless on a sunnier day. I am so grateful to have had Ben and could not recommend him any more.
